positive: A highly detailed, central illustration of 'Dreaming Canopy': a stylized arrangement of bioluminescent flora, intertwining with geometric celestial bodies and gentle crescent moons. The primary elements are stylized jungle leaves (palms, ferns) mixed with soft, glowing abstract cosmic dust. Use a clean, graphic silhouette style with bold, high-contrast linework and solid color blocks (deep indigo, teal, sapphire, and glowing neon coral accents). The composition must be symmetrical and highly readable, designed to fill the square space elegantly. Minimalistic negative space, perfect for printing on a solid fabric background. Vector art aesthetics, woodcut engraving detail level, fantasy botany illustration, high contrast, intricate etching style, smooth gradient transitions.
